features.claim: Antigravity's agent generates an implementation plan artifact that details the technical revisions needed to accomplish the task, which users can review, comment on, and configure approval policies for.
features.name: Implementation Plan
subfeatures: Artifact review policy (e.g. 'Always Proceed') to control whether the agent pauses for approval before executing
Commenting on artifacts with inline comments to provide feedback such as reducing scope or changing direction
Review button in the artifact header to consolidate all comments into a single message of feedback to the agent
